description: Allows the assignment of the IMouthTrackingSourceComponent to blendshapes.

fields.DataSource: The component that is providing raw mouth tracking data from a physical or virtual device on a machine.
fields.VolumeSource: A volume source like a Volume Meter that is used to determine facial tracking better.
fields.SilenceSource: A silence source like the target value of the ``Silence`` field on a Direct Viseme Driver
fields.ExpressionDrivers: A list of Expression Drivers that take facial data and drive a float or blendshape with the data.

methods.AutoAssign: Assign blendshapes to this component's drivers and create new drivers based on heuristics.

notes.title: Expression
notes.text:
The different expressions an ExpressionDriver can have when driving any float value (or blendshapes)

This list is ever constantly expanding, and as such will be incomplete for vast periods of time. Feel free to help us fill this table.
